title: fadogia chlorantha
intro: Fadogia chlorantha, also known as African mango plant, is a flowering plant species native to West Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fadogia chlorantha include improved fertility, increased muscle mass, and enhanced endurance, making it a popular supplement among athletes and individuals seeking to improve their physical performance. Fadogia chlorantha is often prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tablets, and can also be consumed as a tea or infusion.
